Want to help people show up stronger every day? Join a high-energy team that empowers members to live better lives through kickboxing fitness, nutrition and community.

As a family owned and operated business, we believe that people should feel fulfilled when they’re at work. We want our team members to find a sense of belonging when they join 9Round. Our franchise model gives potential employees the opportunity to find a studio they can thrive in, and our business model gives people the satisfaction of knowing they’re helping people transform their lives and grow healthier every day.

OUR MISSION

From the CEO to the instructors in our boutique fitness studios, we're all about making members stronger physically and mentally, so they can show up every day ready to fight.

ABOUT 9ROUND

9Round has been delivering fast, effective kickboxing workouts for more than 10 years. Founded in 2008 by husband and wife, Shannon and Heather Hudson, in Greenville, South Carolina, the circuit training format provides a killer workout in just 30 minutes. Actua mobilizes a holistic approach to restore equity imbalances within the Canadian innovation ecosystem, ensuring the skills and confidence of youth can be built today – barrier free – in preparation for the workforce of tomorrow.

We’re on a mission to unlock the infinite potential of youth while radically and relentlessly removing barriers to STEM.

See current opportunities
Our Core Values
Equity

We recognize that advantages and barriers exist, and prioritize equity throughout everything we do to restore balance in the innovation ecosystem.

Community

We respect the knowledge and experiences of the communities we serve, and leverage these strengths to achieve collective impact.

Confidence

We are hyper-focused on building the confidence of youth, and those we work with, by connecting them with peers, role models and safe and inclusive STEM programming.

Curiosity

We are passionate about learning and remain forever curious as we seek to continuously innovate, challenge the status quo and exceed expectations.

Venezuela Earthquake

Help Now
HELP NOW
CAREERS
Show Photo Credit
Stuart Tibaweswa
Action Against Hunger, Uganda
Close Photo Credit
You have talent and passion. We have opportunities. Together we can end hunger. For everyone. For good.
CURRENT OPENINGS
JOIN OUR TEAM

Action Against Hunger is a global humanitarian organization that takes decisive action against the causes and effects of hunger. We save the lives of malnourished children. We ensure everyone can access clean water, food, training, and healthcare. We enable entire communities to be free from hunger. Action Against Hunger serves more than 26.5 million people in more than 55 countries. Our team works across the world to ensure everyone can access clean water, food, training, and healthcare. Together, we extensively research global crises, implement innovative and sustainable solutions, provide critical care to malnourished children, and work to create a hunger-free world.

BROWSE JOBS
OUR OFFICES

Action Against Hunger’s U.S. office currently manages operations in eight countries: Ethiopia, Haiti, Kenya, Somalia, South Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, and Zambia, with approximately 1,800 staff based in New York City, Washington D.C., Nairobi, and country offices.

The world needs a better way to deal with hunger. Together, we’re creating it. For everyone, for good. Join us!

WORKING AT ACTION AGAINST HUNGER
Our Culture & Values

Our core values shape the underlying principles of how we work.

Skip to content
REGULATORY NOTICE

HOSPITALSAescia for Hospitals is an investigational Software as a Medical Device under the TGA Class IIa pathway. Not yet available for commercial supply.

CLINICSAescia for Clinics is a workflow and patient-preparation tool. It does not propose clinical decisions and is not a medical device.

Aescia
HEALTH
Platform
For Hospitals
For Clinics
Evidence
Updates
Team
Careers
Contact
EN
Request a briefing
CAREERS
Build the software clinicians actually use.

Aescia is a small, clinician-led team building continuous-care software for the weeks that matter: after a hospital discharge, and before a scheduled procedure. We write our own clinical pathways and ship our own code. The product is in clinical evaluation today, not a roadmap.

OPEN ROLES
Senior Frontend / Full-Stack Engineer

Own the front end of a medical platform: the patient and clinician apps, plus a research dashboard. Vue 3 first, with React for analytics. Remote, working closely with our CTO.

ENGINEERING
REMOTE, QUÉBEC PREFERRED
SENIOR, CONTRACT OR PERMANENT
View role
NO ROLE THAT FITS?
Tell us what you would build.

We are clinician-led and engineering-light by design. If you are exceptional at something we will obviously need, write to us with what you have built. We read everything.
